# Prayer Lock

> Prayer Lock is a free mobile app that blocks distracting apps on your phone until you pray. It helps people build a daily prayer habit, track a prayer streak, and reduce screen time by putting prayer before scrolling. Available now on iPhone (App Store); Android is in development.

## What Prayer Lock does

- **Blocks your phone until you pray.** You choose which apps to block (social media, news, games). They stay locked until you complete your prayer time, then unlock.
- **Daily prayer streak.** Tracks consecutive days of prayer to keep you consistent.
- **Reduces screen time.** Gating your most-used apps behind prayer naturally cuts doomscrolling.
- **Prayer history & mood tracking.** Review past prayer sessions and how you felt over time.

## Key facts

- Price: Free
- Platform: iOS (iPhone) — live. Android — in development (waitlist).
- Audience: Christians and anyone who wants to make prayer a daily priority before reaching for their phone.
- Privacy: Prayer Lock does not read the content of your prayers.
- Website: https://prayer-lock.com/
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/ro/app/prayer-lock-quiet-time/id6758918601

## Pages

- [Home](https://prayer-lock.com/): What Prayer Lock is, how it works, features, and FAQ.
- [Privacy Policy](https://prayer-lock.com/privacy.html): What data is and isn't collected.
- [Terms and Conditions](https://prayer-lock.com/terms.html): User agreement.
- [Delete Account & Data](https://prayer-lock.com/delete-account.html): How to remove your account and data.
